name: On Ice Special Package
description: Explore the Whitsundays and the Great Barrier Reef with a variety of exciting tours and packages. Whether you're looking for a multiday sailing adventure or a unique night in an underwater hotel, there are options to suit every traveler. Enjoy snorkeling or scuba diving in pristine reefs, relax on the stunning Whitehaven Beach, or choose from a range of thrilling activities like scenic flights and jet skiing. Ideal for adventure seekers, families, and couples looking to experience the beauty of Australia's tropical paradise.
departure_location: Coral Sea Marina Meeting Point C
highlights:
Snorkeling and scuba diving in pristine reefs
Relaxing on Whitehaven Beach
Scenic flights and jet skiing
Unique overnight accommodations
Customizable private charters
locations: Airlie Beach,Great Barrier Reef,Hamilton Island,Hill Inlet,Whitehaven,Whitsunday Island
important_information: ['Minimum age for children is 6 years of age.', 'Any guests under 18 must be able to swim, and children must be supervised by parents for the duration of the trip.', 'Guests under 18 cannot be booked into shared accommodation, except where the group will occupy an entire shared area.', 'This is a water-based activity, for safety reasons ALL passengers must be able to swim and speak fluent English.', 'This sailing adventure is only suitable for active people. A basic level of fitness and mobility is required.']
